category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for space heating and domestic hot water applications targeting the Irish market (NSAI / EPA / SEAI).

title.en: China-to-Ireland Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入爱尔兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入愛爾蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Ireland-specific requirements: CE marking, Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281, F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 (enforced by EPA Ireland), Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU, SEAI grant eligibility rules, and related Irish safety and EMC requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与爱尔兰特定要求的差距对照，涵盖CE标志、生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281、氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573（由爱尔兰EPA执行）、压力设备指令2014/68/EU、SEAI补贴资格规则及相关爱尔兰安全与EMC要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與愛爾蘭特定要求的差距對照，涵蓋CE標誌、生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281、氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573（由愛爾蘭EPA執行）、壓力設備指令2014/68/EU、SEAI補貼資格規則及相關愛爾蘭安全與EMC要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, refrigerant-handling guidance, pressure-system design, customs determination, SEAI grant eligibility determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Irish and EU law, harmonised standards, F-gas licensing requirements, pressure equipment categories, SEAI product listing requirements, and destination-country installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、制冷剂处理指导、压力系统设计、海关裁定、SEAI补贴资格认定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行爱尔兰及欧盟法律、协调标准、氟化气体许可要求、压力设备类别、SEAI产品名单要求及目的国安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、製冷劑處理指導、壓力系統設計、海關裁定、SEAI補貼資格認定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行愛爾蘭及歐盟法律、協調標準、氟化氣體許可要求、壓力設備類別、SEAI產品名單要求及目的國安裝規則。

answer_first.en: CE marking (LVD + EMC + Ecodesign + PED), EPA Ireland F-gas technician certification, SEAI Heat Pump Products List eligibility, and Irish Building Regulations Part L SCOP compliance are the major Ireland-specific compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps beyond baseline EU requirements.
answer_first.zh: CE标志（低压指令+EMC指令+生态设计+PED）、爱尔兰EPA氟化气体技术人员认证、SEAI热泵产品名单资格，以及爱尔兰建筑法规L部分SCOP合规，是中国空气源热泵进入爱尔兰市场除基本欧盟要求外的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: CE標誌（低壓指令+EMC指令+生態設計+PED）、愛爾蘭EPA氟化氣體技術人員認證、SEAI熱泵產品名單資格，以及愛爾蘭建築法規L部分SCOP合規，是中國空氣源熱泵進入愛爾蘭市場除基本歐盟要求外的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Irish regulator (NSAI, EPA, SEAI, Department of Housing), EU regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
